title: LackingMons (Discountiniued)
description:
support of the project has ended.
please read description for more info
body:
LackingMons, meticulously integrated into the Cobblemon mod for Minecraft, remedies the absence of certain Pokémon species. As Cobblemon transforms the gameplay with its Pokémon elements, LackingMons flawlessly steps in to enrich this vibrant world, allowing trainers to rediscover, capture, and engage with these previously missing Pokémon. While the roster of absent Pokémon is still being addressed, this integration enhances the immersive journey, reigniting the thrill of exploration and adventure within Minecraft's expansive universe.

FOR THOSE SEEKING COMPREHENSIVE DOCUMENTATION AND WISHING TO STAY ABREAST OF THE LATEST DEVELOPMENTS, WE INVITE YOU TO JOIN OUR VIBRANT DISCORD COMMUNITY!

18.10.2024
I’m announcing the end of support for the Lackingmons project. From now on, it will be merged with Missingmons, an addon created by @RedRibbon. Some of my models  and anims will still be included in Missingmons, I will help redribbon on the mod side of his addon and animation side from time to time i will help model wise. This change is especially helpful since I’m no longer able to create updates as large as before and i don't want my community to wait that long for not that meaningfull update

link to the project we switched to work on [ https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon ]( https://modrinth.com/datapack/missingmons-cobblemon )


Thank you to everyone who supported Lackingmons by downloading and enjoying it!
best regards -izetyxx

# IMPORTANT NOTICE TO SERVER OWNERS:
While this datapack can be employed on servers, it's crucial to adhere to LackinMons's policy. This datapack and its contents must not be placed behind a paywall or sold using real-world currency or money-related exchanges. If you come across a server violating these terms, please report it to us and Mojang for appropriate action.
